title: carpinus shimenensis
intro: Carpinus shimenensis, also known as Shimen hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Betulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carpinus shimenensis include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Carpinus shimenensis include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various conditions, such as fever and digestive issues, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
